passage:
Contains:

Sennin / Ryūnosuke Akutagawa --
A woman alone with her soul / Thomas Bailey Aldrich --
Ben-Tobith / Leonid Andreyev --
Phantom basket / John Aubrey --
Drowned giant / J.G. Ballard --
Enoch Soames / Max Beerbohm --
Tail of the sphinx / Ambrose Bierce --
Squid in its own ink / Adolfo Bioy Casares --
Guilty eyes / Ah'med Ech Chiruani --
Anything you want! ... / Léon Bloy --
